text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Three, two, one... There—gotcha! You can't beat
me charging in blindly like that!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, Shakur! Nice play! That's what I call expert
positioning!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Come on, where'd all that bravado go, huh? The
second you stop thinking, it's game over for you!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...Hey, how long do you plan on sticking around?
You're making it hard to focus.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I can't help it! You're simply so amazing
even when you're playing games. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Even if there's no path forward, you use your own
strength to make one. You have the defiant spirit
of a real hero!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Heh, a hero? That's not my style. Never has
been...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I just can't resist the urge to prove my theories
are unbeatable, even when it's only a game. I'm
more like a self-serving villain.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe, that's exactly what the hero would say. ♪
